test case id: tc-signalling-001 title: create signalling with valid data module: signalling source pages: 4 preconditions: user is logged in. test data: - description: this is a new signalling. - image: image.jpg - coordinates: 40.7128, -74.0060 - urgency: high test steps: 1. user creates a new signalling via the ui. 2. ui sends the data to the system. 3. system validates the data. 4. system uploads the image to firebasestorage. 5. system associates the signalling with the nearest entity. 6. system confirms the save operation. expected result: signalling is successfully created and associated with the nearest entity.
